document.title: VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS V2.x Datasheet
standards: PCI Express Base Specification, Revision 4.0, Version 0.7

sourceSummary.oneLine: Variscite datasheet for the VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS V2.x NXP i.MX 8M Plus-based system-on-module.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as manufacturer technical evidence for component identification, supported interfaces, assembly options, electrical/environmental limits, and legal/use restrictions.
keyPoints: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS is based on the NXP i.MX 8M Plus family and is described as a low-power, high-performance System-on-Module.
Revision history lists Rev. 1.02 dated Aug 8, 2024 with Bluetooth version updated to 5.4.
The SOM is available with up to 8 GB LPDDR4-4000 memory and up to 128 GB eMMC storage.
Wireless options include Murata Type 2EL based on NXP IW612 for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth 5.4 and 802.15.4, or Murata Type 2DL based on NXP IW611 for Wi-Fi and Bluetooth 5.4.

Legal notice states Variscite products are not intended for life support systems, nuclear systems, or systems where malfunction can reasonably be expected to result in injury, death, or severe property/environmental damage.

entities.name: VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS
entities.evidence: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS offers a high-performance processing for a low-power System-on-Module.

entities.name: NXP i.MX 8M Plus
entities.evidence: The product is based on the i.MX 8M Plus family

entities.name: Murata Type 2EL Module
entities.evidence: VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS contains Murata's certified high-performance Type 2EL Module based upon the NXP IW612 chipset supporting Wi-Fi® 11a/b/g/n/ac/ax + Bluetooth® 5.4 + 802.15.4 wireless connectivity.

entities.name: Murata Type 2DL Module
entities.evidence: VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS contains Murata's certified high-performance Type 2DL Module based upon the NXP IW611 chipset supporting Wi-Fi® 11a/b/g/n/ac/ax + Bluetooth® 5.4 wireless connectivity.

entities.name: NXP IW612
entities.evidence: 2.4GHz & 5GHz Wi-Fi® + Bluetooth® + 802.15.4 Module based on NXP IW612 chipset

entities.name: NXP IW611
entities.evidence: 2.4GHz & 5GHz Wi-Fi® + Bluetooth® Module based on NXP IW611 chipset

entities.name: PCA9450CHN
entities.evidence: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS features Dual Freescale/NXP’s PCA9450CHN chip as a Power Management Integrated circuit (PMIC).

entities.name: MXL86110C or MXL86110I
entities.evidence: The SOM features on board an MXL86110C or MXL86110I Integrated Ethernet Transceiver.

entities.name: TI TSC2046
entities.evidence: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS features on board a 4-wire resistive touch panel interface controller (TI TSC2046).

entities.name: WM8904
entities.evidence: The WM8904 is a high performance ultra-low power stereo CODEC optimized for portable audio applications.

concepts.name: System-on-Module
concepts.evidence: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS offers a high-performance processing for a low-power System-on-Module.

concepts.name: Assembly Options
concepts.evidence: The table below lists the Hardware configurations options orderable for the VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS.

concepts.name: Wireless Connectivity
concepts.evidence: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS contains a certified high-performance Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, 802.15.4 module.

concepts.name: Restricted Use / Legal Notice
concepts.evidence: Variscite products are not intended for use in life support systems, appliances, nuclear systems or systems where malfunction can reasonably be expected to result in personal injury, death or severe property or environmental damage.

evidence.claim: The document is the VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS V2.x Datasheet from Variscite Ltd.
The datasheet revision is Rev. 1.02 and the document date shown is 08/2024.
Revision 1.02 updated the Bluetooth version to 5.4 on Aug 8, 2024.
The product is based on the NXP i.MX 8M Plus family.
evidence.evidenceText: The product is based on the i.MX 8M Plus family

evidence.claim: The SOM supports up to 8 GB LPDDR4 RAM and up to 128 GB eMMC boot and storage.
evidence.evidenceText: Memory o Up to 8GB LPDDR4 RAM @ 2000Mhz o 8-bit up to 128GB eMMC boot and storage

evidence.claim: The SOM exposes a 200-pin SO-DIMM connector.
evidence.evidenceText: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS exposes a 200-pin SO-DIMM connector.

evidence.claim: Wireless options include certified Wi-Fi and Bluetooth modules with Bluetooth 5.4.
The PMIC is PCA9450CHN and regulates SOM power rails from a single 3.3 V power supply.
evidence.evidenceText: The PCA9450CHN regulates power rails required on SOM from a single 3.3V power supply.

evidence.claim: The SOM has an onboard MXL86110C or MXL86110I Integrated Ethernet Transceiver.
evidence.evidenceText: The SOM features on board an MXL86110C or MXL86110I Integrated Ethernet Transceiver.

evidence.claim: The SOM may include a 4-wire resistive touch controller, TI TSC2046.
evidence.evidenceText: The VAR-SOM-MX8M-PLUS features on board a 4-wire resistive touch panel interface controller (TI TSC2046).

evidence.claim: The resistive touch controller cannot be assembled with the WBE option.
evidence.evidenceText: Resistive touch Controller cannot be assembled if WBE option is selected.

evidence.claim: Some COEX, WBRST, ANT2, and BTPCM assembly options were not fully tested yet.
evidence.evidenceText: Note: This assembly option was not fully tested yet; for further support, please contact sales@variscite.com

evidence.claim: The operating temperature ranges include commercial 0°C to 70°C, extended -25°C to 85°C, and industrial -40°C to 85°C.
evidence.evidenceText: Commercial Operating Temperature Range 0°C 70°C; Extended Operating Temperature Range -25°C 85°C; Industrial Operating Temperature Range -40°C 85°C

evidence.claim: VCC_SOM operating range is 3.25 V minimum, 3.3 V typical, and 3.45 V maximum.
Variscite states the product is not intended for life support, nuclear, or similar high-risk systems.
evidence.evidenceText: Variscite products are not intended for use in life support systems, appliances, nuclear systems or systems where malfunction can reasonably be expected to result in personal injury, death or severe property or environmental damage.

evidence.claim: The hardware warranty period is one year from shipment.
evidence.evidenceText: Variscite guarantees hardware products against defects in workmanship and material for a period of one (1) year from the date of shipment.

reviewFlags.reason: SOURCE_INPUT authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text is a manufacturer datasheet from Variscite Ltd. and contains no FDA authority, clearance, approval, or jurisdictional regulatory determination.
Document date is represented as 08/2024 on the cover/header, while revision history gives the specific Rev. 1.02 date as Aug 8, 2024.
The source is a component datasheet and legal notice, not a regulatory certificate or conformity declaration.
Some OCR/text artifacts and typos are present, including duplicated table headers and terms such as '802.15.14' and 'Phillips' in context.
